title: Mildly Melty Vietnamese shrimp Vietnamese Noodle Soup
description: A tangy and dense Vietnamese noodle soup made with emmental cheese and a pasta-water emulsion, suitable for pescatarians.
instructions: Bring the bone broth to a boil in a large pot.
Reduce the heat to a simmer and add the fish sauce, soy sauce, sugar, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Add the shrimp to the pot and cook until pink and fully cooked.
Reduce the heat to a low simmer and add the pasta water, stirring constantly to create a creamy emulsion.
Add the cooked noodles to the pot and stir to combine.
Stir in the shredded emmental cheese until melted and well combined.
Serve hot and garnish with sliced green onions, if desired.
